programmes.show_name: White Hot: A Sandra Brown Mystery
programmes.show_description: Mystery thriller with Shenae Grimes-Beech. After her brother's sudden death, Sayre returns to the town and family she escaped a decade ago, to turn it all upside down to find the truth... (2016)
...to Con A Con: Cosy crime drama with Candace Cameron Bure. Librarian-turned-sleuth Aurora takes a break from wedding planning when one of Aida's real estate clients is found murdered. (2021)

programmes.show_description: Thriller starring Ana Golja. When Sonya finds out her traditional Romani parents have arranged a marriage for her, till death do us part takes on a whole new meaning... (2020)
